fields.label: Store label
fields.description: Optional display name override for imported Kaufland receipts.

fields.label: Receipt country
fields.description: Country code passed to the Kaufland transaction API. Defaults to DE.

fields.label: Preferred store id
fields.description: Optional Kaufland home-store id forwarded during Cidaas auth and refresh.

fields.label: Plugin state path
fields.description: Optional persistent path for Kaufland OAuth and user-info state.

fields.label: Fixture file
fields.description: Optional offline JSON fixture for local testing only.

onboarding.title: Sign in through Kaufland account login
onboarding.summary: Kaufland receipt sync boots through the same Cidaas browser login flow the Android app uses.
onboarding.expected_speed: Usually quick if the Kaufland account login completes normally in the shared browser window.
onboarding.caution: This plugin targets app-backed grocery receipts, not Kaufland marketplace orders from the normal web shop.

steps.title: Start connector auth
steps.description: Open the normal receipt-connector auth/bootstrap action so the host can launch the plugin-provided login flow.

steps.title: Finish Kaufland login
steps.description: Sign in in the shared browser window and let the redirect complete back into the plugin auth flow.

steps.title: Sync digital receipts
steps.description: After the callback is confirmed, later syncs use host-side HTTP requests against Kaufland's receipt backend.
